# Pull Request Template

## Description
- Provide a brief summary of the changes made in this PR.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have followed the Git Protocol Standard.
- [ ] My code adheres to the Testing SOP.
- [ ] I have added unit tests for all new functionality.
- [ ] I have run all tests and verified that they pass.

## Testing Verification
- [ ] Did you run the adversarial test case?
- [ ] Did the judges remain in character (Prosecutor, Defense, Tech Lead)?

## Additional Notes
- Include any additional information or context that reviewers should know.
